services.title: Environmental Impact Assessment
services.desc: Comprehensive EIA studies for infrastructure, industrial, and development projects following national and international standards.

services.title: GIS & Remote Sensing
services.desc: Satellite imagery analysis, spatial data management, and geospatial mapping for environmental monitoring and planning.

services.title: Climate Change Research
services.desc: Scenario modeling, vulnerability assessments, and adaptation planning grounded in IPCC-aligned methodologies.

services.title: Disaster Risk Reduction
services.desc: Multi-hazard risk profiling, early warning systems design, and community-based DRR strategies for flood, cyclone, and drought.

services.title: Environmental Monitoring
services.desc: Real-time air, water, and soil quality monitoring networks with data dashboards for informed policy decisions.

services.title: Environmental Research
services.desc: Applied and academic research on biodiversity, ecosystem services, land-use change, and environmental governance.

services.title: Community Engagement
services.desc: Citizen science programs, participatory mapping, and environmental education for grassroots sustainability action.

services.title: Climate Resilience Planning
services.desc: City-level and national climate action plans integrating nature-based solutions and adaptive infrastructure.

services.title: Sustainability Consulting
services.desc: Corporate sustainability strategies, carbon footprint analysis, green certification support, and ESG reporting.
